description: Texture loader and format handling -- Three.js TextureLoader usage, alpha channel detection (distinguishing images with and without transparency), aspect ratio reading from loaded textures (texture.image.width/height), handling of non-transparent images on subject/foreground planes (warning about rectangular edges). Covers C-09 (image format tolerance) and partially addresses OQ-02 (images without alpha).
notes: Tier 2 engine core. Runs inside the browser page -- depends on page shell (OBJ-010). Spec defines browser-side texture loading API (loadTexture/loadTextures/getTexture/unload), alpha detection via 64x64 canvas sampling with threshold 250, Node-side checkTextureSlotCompatibility() warning utility, and dispose() integration. Blocks OBJ-039, OBJ-040, OBJ-052.
